violations.description: Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. -Provide probe thermometer 0F-220F before beginning food prep.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. -Food safe sanitizer not available in unit at time of inspection.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -No sanitizer test strips available at time of inspection.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Leak at aerator of sink faucet.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Debris at interior surfaces of pizza oven and air fryer-had been left dirty from previous service.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. -Could not locate any food safe sanitizers in unit.--Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -3 comp sink is set up with 2 faucets to fill the 3 basins. 2nd faucet is not working so basins have to be filled with bucket from 1st faucet.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -No sanitizer test strips available at time of inspection.

Water Supply. — --Nonpublic water supply was not tested by EPA-certified laboratory monthly for bacteriological analysis. -Last bacterial water sample conducted May 8th 2024.--Nonpublic water supply was not tested by EPA-certified laboratory annually for nitrate analysis. -Last nitrate sample unknown, documentation not readily available.
Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate. Listed CFSM is expired.
